name: api-documentation
description: npm registry API documentation build for GitHub Pages

scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run validate && npx @redocly/cli build-docs openapi.yaml -o html/index.html
scripts.lint: npm run lint:yaml && npm run lint:js
scripts.lint:yaml: npm run generate && npx @redocly/cli lint openapi.yaml

author: GitHub Inc.
